OUR·SPACE

Further reading

Surveying the watched commons…

Inking the street network, the cameras and plate-readers, transit corridors, and the exposure field (~26 MB).

Streets © OpenStreetMap (ODbL) · fixed CCTV: Amnesty International Decode Surveillance NYC (CC BY-NC-ND 4.0) + Dahir et al. 2025 (CC BY 4.0), aggregated & de-duplicated · ALPR plate readers: DeFlock via OSM (crowdsourced) · DOT traffic cams: NYC DOT (nyctmc.org) locations only — images not used · ACE: MTA GTFS + NY OpenData · diversity: US Census ACS · rideshare-camera density: NYC TLC Uber/Lyft trips. Smart glasses remain a scenario.
